target.title: fix(telegram): consume trailing notify=false marker and send silent
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

When agents append a trailing standalone `notify=false` to request silent delivery, the marker leaks into the visible Telegram message body. Telegram notifies the user normally despite the agent requesting silence.

## Root Cause

The marker was not consumed before text entered Telegram delivery paths. Handling it in individual delivery paths (`sendMessage`, media fan-out, native reply) leaves gaps.

## Fix

Consume the marker once in `sendTelegramPayloadMessages` вЂ” the **shared upstream entry point** for ALL Telegram outbound delivery. One fix covers every path.

- **1 file, 18 lines** (outbound-adapter.ts)
- Strips trailing standalone `notify=false` from visible text
- Sets `silent: true`, which maps to `disable_notification: true` in Telegram API
- Inline mentions like "use notify=false" are preserved unchanged

Closes #80569

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Telegram channel (outbound adapter)

## Evidence

### Full pipeline proof: marker в†’ silent в†’ API params

```
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
  #98150 Full Pipeline Proof вЂ” notify=false в†’ silent delivery
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

в”Ђв”Ђ Phase 1: Marker parsing в”Ђв”Ђ
  вњ… trailing standalone
  вњ… marker only
  вњ… whitespace tolerant
  вњ… after blank line
  вњ… inline (not consumed)
  вњ… middle (not consumed)

в”Ђв”Ђ Phase 2: silent flag propagation (all paths) в”Ђв”Ђ
  вњ… text-only path: silent=true, text="hello"
  вњ… media caption path: silent=true, text="media caption"
  вњ… native reply path: silent=true, text="reply text"
  вњ… no marker в†’ no silent: silent=undefined, text="normal message"
  вњ… empty text: silent=undefined, text=""

в”Ђв”Ђ Phase 3: Telegram API parameter mapping в”Ђв”Ђ
  silent=true  в†’ {"disable_notification":true} вњ…
  silent=false в†’ {} вњ… (no param)
  silent=undef в†’ {} вњ… (no param)

вњ… ALL CHECKS PASSED
```

### Test suite вЂ” zero regression

```
npx vitest run extensions/telegram/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)     Tests  27 passed (27)

npx vitest run extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)     Tests  139 passed (139)
```

### Formatting

```
pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/telegram/src/outbound-adapter.ts
  All matched files use the correct format.
```

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
